title: 0M3REXE/eidolon
summary: Eidolon is a high-performance reverse proxy designed to secure Large Language Model (LLM) interactions. It intercepts outgoing prompts to providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google, automatically detects and redacts Personally Identifiable Information (PII) using a hybrid engine, and restores the original data in the response.
